costs_slippage.method: Subtract one_way_turnover * bps/10000 from replayed daily portfolio returns.

data.price_adjustment_note: qfa AlpacaGateway stock bars request; no explicit adjusted-price flag exposed.
data.source: Alpaca real market data via qfa AlpacaGateway

decision.rationale: Rejected: random-window median Sharpe or redundancy target failed after explicit held-out-correlation penalties.

orthogonality_checks.method: Pearson correlation of AR-062 10 bps cost-adjusted daily returns versus retained artifact equity-curve returns when available.

qfa.interface: quant_for_agent BacktestConfig/run_backtest with AlpacaGateway real bars
qfa.sanitized_command_provenance: Sourced the Alpaca profile environment if present, mapped ALPACA_KEY_ID to ALPACA_API_KEY in-process, and ran qfa backtest/replay code without --data-csv, without daemon, and without order submission. Credential values were not printed or stored.

random_period_protocol.method: Eight deterministic pseudo-random subwindows across 2023-2025 using Alpaca real bars through qfa; no CSV and no --data-csv; external 10/20 bps one-way turnover cost proxy.

divergent.rationale: Genuinely different mechanism from momentum/correlation targets; use ex-ante stress pricing rather than realized ETF trend rotation.
divergent.title: ETF defensive allocation from options-implied stress term structure and credit spread shocks

warnings: External cost model is a turnover haircut because qfa native transaction costs are unavailable.
Orthogonality is limited to retained artifact equity curves that expose enough overlapping observations.
AlpacaGateway does not expose adjusted-price controls in this repository version.
